\\

\newline

(c) (i) (d) On the scatter diagram, draw a line of best fit.
\newline

(e) There are 45 people in a different building.
\newline
\\
    Find an estimate for the number of rooms in this building.
\newline

    

(f) What type of correlation is shown in the scatter diagram?
